name: FN57 | 紫藤老树
collection: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. It has been spray-painted with a flower pattern in purple and gold. Some see a nuisance; I see beauty
descriptionZh: 拥有极高的精准度，能穿透护甲，价格昂贵的 FN57 换弹时间较慢，作为补偿，它具有设计巧妙的 20 发子弹和较低的后坐力。 这把武器采用紫色和金色的花朵图案进行喷涂。 有人觉得是破事儿，在我看来是好事儿
